# Summarycode Golden Fixtures

This directory contains local copies of the ScanCode `summarycode` fixture corpus used by `src/main_test.rs`.

The runtime tests in this repository must read fixture data only from `testdata/`, not from `reference/scancode-toolkit/`.

Current copied suites:

- `classify/`
- `generated/`
- `score/`
- `summary/`

Original source: `reference/scancode-toolkit/tests/summarycode/data/`
